topics.title: R.D. Moore's Jet Boat Mishap and Missed Meeting
topics.summary: The studio features R.D. Moore recounting a series of mishaps involving an overturned jet ski, a missed meeting with a network executive due to oversleeping in a hotel room, and his subsequent humorous apology.

topics.title: Eddie Van Halen and Jack Daniels
topics.summary: The studio discusses a potential interview with Eddie Van Halen regarding his music for a porn film while also sharing trivia about the history of Jack Daniels.

topics.title: Medical Issues and Dream Analysis
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding personal health struggles with urinary issues and kidney stones, followed by an analysis of a recurring dream involving defecation and a cinematic role as Jesus.

topics.title: Yankees and Mets Comparison
topics.summary: The studio discusses the differing perceptions of the New York Yankees' and New York Mets' seasons, highlighting the competitive landscape of their respective divisions.

topics.title: Contract Negotiations with Riley Martin
topics.summary: The studio discusses a significant pay gap between their offer of $300 per show and Riley Martin's demand for $5 million, while also debating Cabbie's potential role on the station.

topics.title: Riley Martin Salary Dispute
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange between Howard Stern and Riley Martin regarding contract negotiations, payment terms for remote broadcasts, and the validity of Martin's claims about space travel.

topics.title: Negotiations with Riley Martin and Guest Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the terms of employment for various guests, including a negotiation with Riley Martin over his pay and a review of recent conflicts involving comedian Bob Levy and others.

topics.title: Jeff's DUI and Job Search
topics.summary: The studio discusses a caller named Jeff who details his recent arrest for driving under the influence and explores potential promotional work for him.

topics.title: Meatloaf Discusses Bat Out of Hell Trademark
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Meatloaf regarding the legal complexities and history behind the trademarking of his album title.

topics.title: Music Industry Contracts and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of music publishing royalties, the guest's personal history with a difficult upbringing, and his firsthand experience in Dallas during the assassination of John F. Kennedy.

topics.title: Meatloaf Discusses New Album and Career
topics.summary: The studio features Meatloaf discussing his upcoming album, his history with Jim Steinman, and personal anecdotes regarding his childhood and past performances.

topics.title: Meatloaf Discusses Industry Anecdotes and New Music
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the meaning of song lyrics, an anecdote about a singer refusing to meet Meatloaf due to his name, and a performance of the track "The Monster is Loose."

topics.title: Meat Loaf Interview and Guitarist Debates
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Meat Loaf regarding his career and personal history before transitioning into a debate over the greatest guitarists of all time and the tragic life of Pink Floyd's Syd Barrett.

topics.title: Rock Music History and Celebrity Interviews
topics.summary: The studio explores various musical icons including Pink Floyd, Alice Cooper, and Paul McCartney while discussing guitar techniques, a listener's voicemail regarding Hulk Hogan, and the sales impact of guest appearances.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments covering a celebrity's arrest for public outbursts, the transition to high-definition broadcasting, and various personal stories involving past relationships and experiences.

topics.title: Mel Gibson Controversy and Music Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including personal anecdotes regarding massages, reports of an anti-semitic radio station in California, Mel Gibson’s recent arrest and public image, and the quality of Meat Loaf's musical collaborations.

topics.title: Mel Gibson, Middle East Conflict, and Radio Industry
topics.summary: The studio discusses Mel Gibson's public persona, the geopolitical situation in Iraq and Lebanon, and recent changes within the terrestrial radio industry.

topics.title: Middle East Conflict and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the ethics of warfare in the Middle East, reports on military actions in Iraq, covers the passing of producer Aaron Spelling, and mentions upcoming entertainment news including a film by Betty Thomas.
